creator: brian@top.worldcontrol.com
text:
cdrecord 1.6 from the ports works great on the 2940W
	and fails consistently on the 2940UW.

Fix: 

Use the 2940W.  Don't use the 2940UW.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Setup a system with both 2940W and 2940UW.
	Put the CD-R on the 2940UW, burn or dummy burn a 500MB
	image.  It will fail 100% of the time.

	Put the CD-R on the 2940W, burn or dummy burn a 500MB
	image.  It will succeed 100% of the time.
